lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾਗਦ ਲਖ ਮਣਾ ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਕੀਚੈ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kaagad lakh manaa parr parr keechai bhaau |
lines.english: O Nanak, if I had hundreds of thousands of stacks of paper, and if I were to read and recite and embrace love for the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸੂ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਲੇਖਣਿ ਪਉਣੁ ਚਲਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: masoo tott na aavee lekhan paun chalaau |
lines.english: and if ink were never to fail me, and if my pen were able to move like the wind

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੀ ਤੇਰੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਹਉ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਆਖਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhee teree keemat naa pavai hau kevadd aakhaa naau |4|2|
lines.english: -even so, I could not estimate Your Value. How can I describe the Greatness of Your Name? ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖੈ ਸਾਹ ਲਵਾਈਅਹਿ ਪੜੇ ਕਿ ਪੁਛਣ ਜਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: lekhai saah lavaaeeeh parre ki puchhan jaau |1|
lines.english: As it is pre-ordained, they draw their breath. Why should I go and ask the scholars about this? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖੈ ਬੋਲਣੁ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਲੇਖੈ ਖਾਣਾ ਖਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: lekhai bolan bolanaa lekhai khaanaa khaau |
lines.english: As it is pre-ordained, people speak their words. As it is pre-ordained, they consume their food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖੈ ਵਾਟ ਚਲਾਈਆ ਲੇਖੈ ਸੁਣਿ ਵੇਖਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: lekhai vaatt chalaaeea lekhai sun vekhaau |
lines.english: As it is pre-ordained, they walk along the way. As it is pre-ordained, they see and hear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਏਹ ਨ ਓਹੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: andhai naam visaariaa naa tis eeh na ohu |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The blind man has forgotten the Name; he is in limbo, neither here nor there. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਰਚਨਾ ਧੋਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa maaeaa rachanaa dhohu |
lines.english: O Baba, the splendor of Maya is deceptive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਬਹਿ ਸਮਝਾਈਐ ਤਿਥੈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਚਲਿਓ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jithai beh samajhaaeeai tithai koe na chalio naal |
lines.english: He sits and examines the accounts, there where no one goes along with anyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਣ ਮਰਣਾ ਜਾਇ ਕੈ ਏਥੈ ਖਾਜੈ ਕਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeevan maranaa jaae kai ethai khaajai kaal |
lines.english: Life and death come to all who are born. Everything here gets devoured by Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਆਖੈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਘਟਿ ਨ ਆਖੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko aakhai bahut bahut ghatt na aakhai koe |
lines.english: Everyone says that God is the Greatest of the Great. No one calls Him any less.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਵਣ ਵਾਲੇ ਜੇਤੜੇ ਸਭਿ ਬੰਨਹਿ ਪੰਡ ਪਰਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: rovan vaale jetarre sabh baneh pandd paraal |2|
lines.english: Those who weep and wail might just as well all tie bundles of straw. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਬੁ ਏਕੁ ਤੂ ਹੋਰਿ ਜੀਆ ਕੇਤੇ ਲੋਅ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saachaa saahab ek too hor jeea kete loa |3|
lines.english: You are the One True Lord and Master of all the other beings, of so many worlds. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈਆ ਕਹਣਿ ਨ ਵਡਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: keemat kinai na paaeea kehan na vaddaa hoe |
lines.english: No one can estimate His Worth. By speaking of Him, His Greatness is not increased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਚਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨੀਚ ਜਾਤਿ ਨੀਚੀ ਹੂ ਅਤਿ ਨੀਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: neechaa andar neech jaat neechee hoo at neech |
lines.english: Nanak seeks the company of the lowest of the low class, the very lowest of the low.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਥਿ ਵਡਿਆ ਸਿਉ ਕਿਆ ਰੀਸ ॥
lines.translit: naanak tin kai sang saath vaddiaa siau kiaa rees |
lines.english: Why should he try to compete with the great?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬੁ ਕੁਤਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਚੂਹੜਾ ਠਗਿ ਖਾਧਾ ਮੁਰਦਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: lab kutaa koorr chooharraa tthag khaadhaa muradaar |
lines.english: Greed is a dog; falsehood is a filthy street-sweeper. Cheating is eating a rotting carcass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਨੀਚ ਸਮਾਲੀਅਨਿ ਤਿਥੈ ਨਦਰਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਖਸੀਸ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: jithai neech samaaleean tithai nadar teree bakhasees |4|3|
lines.english: In that place where the lowly are cared for-there, the Blessings of Your Glance of Grace rain down. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਪਰ ਮਲੁ ਮੁਖ ਸੁਧੀ ਅਗਨਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਚੰਡਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: par nindaa par mal mukh sudhee agan krodh chanddaal |
lines.english: Slandering others is putting the filth of others into your own mouth. The fire of anger is the outcaste who burns dead bodies at the crematorium.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸ ਕਸ ਆਪੁ ਸਲਾਹਣਾ ਏ ਕਰਮ ਮੇਰੇ ਕਰਤਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ras kas aap salaahanaa e karam mere karataar |1|
lines.english: I am caught in these tastes and flavors, and in self-conceited praise. These are my actions, O my Creator! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਬੋਲੀਐ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa boleeai pat hoe |
lines.english: O Baba, speak only that which will bring you honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਤਮ ਸੇ ਦਰਿ ਊਤਮ ਕਹੀਅਹਿ ਨੀਚ ਕਰਮ ਬਹਿ ਰੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aootam se dar aootam kaheeeh neech karam beh roe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They alone are good, who are judged good at the Lord's Door. Those with bad karma can only sit and weep. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸੁ ਘੋੜੇ ਰਸੁ ਸੇਜਾ ਮੰਦਰ ਰਸੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਰਸੁ ਮਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: ras ghorre ras sejaa mandar ras meetthaa ras maas |
lines.english: the pleasure of horses, the pleasure of a soft bed in a palace, the pleasure of sweet treats and the pleasure of hearty meals

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸੁ ਸੁਇਨਾ ਰਸੁ ਰੁਪਾ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਰਮਲ ਕੀ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: ras sueinaa ras rupaa kaaman ras paramal kee vaas |
lines.english: The pleasures of gold and silver, the pleasures of women, the pleasure of the fragrance of sandalwood,

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਤੇ ਰਸ ਸਰੀਰ ਕੇ ਕੈ ਘਟਿ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ete ras sareer ke kai ghatt naam nivaas |2|
lines.english: -these pleasures of the human body are so numerous; how can the Naam, the Name of the Lord, find its dwelling in the heart? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਬੋਲਿਐ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਸੋ ਬੋਲਿਆ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jit boliai pat paaeeai so boliaa paravaan |
lines.english: Those words are acceptable, which, when spoken, bring honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਭਲੇ ਹੋਰਿ ਕਿ ਕਹਣ ਵਖਾਣ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaaveh se bhale hor ki kehan vakhaan |3|
lines.english: Those who are pleasing to Him are good. What else is there to be said? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਕਾ ਬੋਲਿ ਵਿਗੁਚਣਾ ਸੁਣਿ ਮੂਰਖ ਮਨ ਅਜਾਣ ॥
lines.translit: fikaa bol viguchanaa sun moorakh man ajaan |
lines.english: Harsh words bring only grief. Listen, O foolish and ignorant mind!

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਮਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਪਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਧਨੁ ਪਲੈ ਜਿਨ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tin mat tin pat tin dhan palai jin hiradai rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: Wisdom, honor and wealth are in the laps of those whose hearts remain permeated with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਅਵਰ ਸੁਆਲਿਉ ਕਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tin kaa kiaa saalaahanaa avar suaaliau kaae |
lines.english: What praise can be offered to them? What other adornments can be bestowed upon them?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਬਾਹਰੇ ਰਾਚਹਿ ਦਾਨਿ ਨ ਨਾਇ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree baahare raacheh daan na naae |4|4|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who lack the Lord's Glance of Grace cherish neither charity nor the Lord's Name. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਲੁ ਗਲੋਲਾ ਕੂੜ ਕਾ ਦਿਤਾ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: amal galolaa koorr kaa ditaa devanahaar |
lines.english: The Great Giver has given the intoxicating drug of falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੀ ਮਰਣੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਖੁਸੀ ਕੀਤੀ ਦਿਨ ਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: matee maran visaariaa khusee keetee din chaar |
lines.english: The people are intoxicated; they have forgotten death, and they have fun for a few days.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਸੋਫੀਆ ਰਾਖਣ ਕਉ ਦਰਵਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sach miliaa tin sofeea raakhan kau daravaar |1|
lines.english: Those who do not use intoxicants are true; they dwell in the Court of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚੇ ਕਉ ਸਚੁ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak saache kau sach jaan |
lines.english: O Nanak, know the True Lord as True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਤੇਰੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਚਲੈ ਮਾਣੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jit seviai sukh paaeeai teree daragah chalai maan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Serving Him, peace is obtained; you shall go to His Court with honor. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਰਾ ਗੁੜ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sach saraa gurr baaharaa jis vich sachaa naau |
lines.english: The Wine of Truth is not fermented from molasses. The True Name is contained within it.
